description: Machine-readable index of spheres, leaves, and cross-domain connections for agent discovery

spheres.title: Socio-Technical
spheres.description: Human-created systems: infrastructure, services, socioeconomic patterns, governance, ICT and flows, thematic perception, informal systems, risk

spheres.title: Hydrosphere
spheres.description: Water bodies, precipitation, water quality, hydrology

spheres.title: Toposphere
spheres.description: Terrain, bathymetry, surface properties, remote-sensed observations, and coordinate reference systems

leaves.title: Firms
leaves.question: What firm is this, as a legal registered entity?

leaves.title: Economic Activities
leaves.question: What economic activity does a business perform?

leaves.title: Business Locations
leaves.question: Where does a business physically operate?

leaves.title: Ownership and Governance
leaves.question: Who owns, controls, or governs a firm?

leaves.title: Economics and Employment
leaves.question: What are the economic and employment characteristics of a firm or establishment?

leaves.title: Addresses
leaves.question: Where is a property located by its official address?

leaves.title: Buildings
leaves.question: What buildings exist at a location and what are their characteristics?

leaves.title: Administrative Units
leaves.question: Which administrative area does a location belong to?

leaves.title: Cadastral Parcels
leaves.question: What are the legal boundaries and ownership of land?

leaves.title: Geographical Names
leaves.question: What is the official name of a place or feature?

leaves.title: Elevation
leaves.question: What is the elevation at a given location?

leaves.title: Orthoimagery
leaves.question: What does the Earth's surface look like at a location?

leaves.title: Population
leaves.question: How is the population distributed and what are its characteristics?

leaves.title: Transport Networks
leaves.question: What transport routes and networks exist?

leaves.title: Services and Amenities
leaves.question: What services or amenities are available at or near a location?

leaves.title: Bathing Water Quality
leaves.question: Is bathing water suitable and safe for human recreational use at this location and time?

leaves.title: Surface Freshwater Bodies
leaves.question: Which river, lake, wetland, or catchment is this location part of?

leaves.title: Groundwater Bodies
leaves.question: Which groundwater body or aquifer is present here, and what status applies?

leaves.title: Marine and Coastal Waters
leaves.question: Which coastal or marine water body is this location part of, and what condition applies?

leaves.title: Aquaculture Sites
leaves.question: Where are aquaculture activities located, and what production or discharge characteristics are reported there?

leaves.title: Species Observations
realisations: Fund af arter på Habitatdirektivets bilag IV fra Arter.dk
leaves.question: Which species have been observed at this location, and when were they recorded?

VP3 - Bly. Kemisk tilstand og trends. Dybe grundvandsforekomster
leaves.question: What is the chemical status of groundwater in this area, and which substances drive trends or exceedances?

leaves.title: Agricultural Land Management
leaves.question: Which agricultural management patterns and production-use classes apply in this area?

leaves.title: Nature Protection Areas
leaves.question: Which nature protection designations or restrictions apply at this location?

leaves.title: Fisheries Intensity
leaves.question: What fishing effort and gear activity occur in this marine area, and how does it relate to ecosystem pressure and regulation?

Naturmæssigt særlig værdifuld skov på private arealer (§25-skov)

Potentiel Ammoniakfølsom skov – Naturlig lysåben tilgroet areal

leaves.title: Habitat Extent
leaves.question: Which habitat and nature-type areas are mapped at this location?

leaves.title: Biodiversity Priority Indicators
realisations: Biodiversitetskortet - Antal truede arter i 10km kvadrat
leaves.question: How is this area prioritized for biodiversity action, and which indicators drive that priority?

leaves.title: Coastal Erosion Risk
leaves.question: Where is coastal erosion risk highest, and how severe is the expected shoreline impact?

leaves.title: Hydrological Basin Delineations
leaves.question: Which basin or sub-basin does this location belong to in water-management planning?

leaves.title: Marine Spatial Infrastructure
leaves.question: Which marine installations or constrained-use structures are present in this sea area?

leaves.title: Planning and Zoning Decisions
leaves.question: Which planning or zoning decisions apply here, and what constraints do they impose?

leaves.title: Protected Water Use Zones

realisations: VP3 - Nitratfølsomme indvindingsområder brugt i Vandområdeplaner 2021-2027
leaves.question: Which protected-use water zones apply here, and what protection objective do they represent?

leaves.title: Species of Conservation Concern
leaves.question: Which protected or conservation-priority species are documented here?

leaves.title: Surface Flow Systems
leaves.question: How does water move and accumulate on the surface here, including depressions, flooding, and catchment context?

leaves.title: Geological Strata
leaves.question: Which geological strata and subsurface structures are present here, and how do they frame subsurface interpretation?

leaves.title: Subsurface Freshwater
leaves.question: What do boreholes reveal about subsurface freshwater chemistry and aquifer behavior here?

leaves.title: Atmospheric Deposition and Emissions
leaves.question: What atmospheric emissions and deposition loads are modeled for this area?

leaves.title: Nautical Traffic
leaves.question: What vessel traffic patterns are present here, and how intense is maritime movement over time?

leaves.title: Soil Properties
leaves.question: What soil types and near-surface soil properties characterize this area?

leaves.title: Spill and Pollution Incidents
leaves.question: Which spill, contamination, or hazardous discharge signals are reported for this area?

leaves.title: Energy Infrastructure
leaves.question: Which energy infrastructures are present here, and what operational or planning constraints apply to them?

leaves.title: Flood Hazard and Inundation
leaves.question: Which areas are exposed to flooding or inundation here, and under what scenario or return period?

leaves.title: Geodetic Control Points
leaves.question: Where are the geodetic control points, and what coordinates and accuracy do they define?

leaves.title: Historical Map Sheets
leaves.question: Which historical map sheet covers this location, and what cartographic source does it represent?

leaves.title: Property Valuation
leaves.question: What is the official assessed value of a property?

threads.question: Which freshwater surface context does this site belong to?
threads.rationale: Bathing suitability is interpreted against the local freshwater surface context and station placement.

threads.question: Which contamination measurements determine suitability?
threads.rationale: Measured parameters in water are direct inputs to bathing quality status.

threads.question: What do measurements imply for human exposure?
threads.rationale: Water contamination measurements are interpreted as potential human exposure during bathing.

threads.question: Should this site be flagged for risk communication?
threads.rationale: Suitability classes and thresholds support public risk messaging and advisories.

threads.question: Is the bathing service usable at this time?
threads.rationale: Bathing quality status directly affects recreational service availability.

threads.question: How does economic activity connect to ecosystem conditions?
threads.rationale: Industry codes can signal pressures and impacts on ecosystems.

threads.question: How does economic activity connect to land use and cover patterns?
threads.rationale: Industry composition often correlates with classified land use patterns.

threads.question: How do business locations connect to terrain context?
threads.rationale: Terrain and elevation influence accessibility and hazard exposure of business sites.

threads.question: How do business locations connect to land use patterns?
threads.rationale: Business clusters align with urban and industrial land use categories.

threads.question: How does elevation connect to surface water behavior?
threads.rationale: Elevation gradients govern runoff and flow paths in freshwater systems.

threads.question: How does orthoimagery connect to classified land cover products?
threads.rationale: Classified land cover is commonly derived from orthoimagery inputs.

threads.question: How does orthoimagery function as remote-sensed evidence?
threads.rationale: Orthoimagery is a direct observational record of the Earth's surface — the canonical data type for the Remote Sensed Observations twig.

threads.question: How does observed fisheries effort connect to zoning rules and legal management constraints?
threads.rationale: Fishing effort layers are interpreted against protected-area rules, access constraints, and planning designations.

threads.question: How does fisheries effort indicate ecosystem pressure in marine habitats?
threads.rationale: Gear-specific effort intensity is a pressure indicator for benthic habitats, species assemblages, and ecosystem condition.

threads.question: How does a valuation connect to the legal cadastral parcel geometry?
threads.rationale: Property valuation records are non-spatial and require linkage through BFE and cadastral references to retrieve parcel-based geometry and legal boundaries.
